_comment: Gold Tier AI Employee — MCP Server Configuration

email-mcp.description: Gmail draft and send via HITL-gated tool-use. Tools: draft_email, send_email, approve_draft, reject_draft, list_email_drafts.
_setup: 1. cd mcp_servers/email-mcp && npm install
2. Place credentials.json (Google OAuth2 Desktop) in project root
3. node mcp_servers/email-mcp/index.js --auth   (one-time OAuth login)
4. Restart Claude Code -- the email tools appear automatically

send_email.description: Send via Gmail API. HITL gate: draft must be in /Approved first.

list_email_drafts.description: List all email drafts with status across all folders

_test_commands.draft: Ask Claude: "Draft an email to test@example.com subject 'Hello' body 'Test'"
_test_commands.reject: Ask Claude: "Reject draft email_draft_[date]_Hello.md reason 'wrong tone'"

calendar-mcp.description: Google Calendar event draft and create via HITL-gated tool-use. Tools: draft_calendar_event, create_calendar_event, update_calendar_event, approve_calendar_draft, reject_calendar_draft, list_calendar_drafts.
_setup: 1. cd mcp_servers/calendar-mcp && npm install
2. Go to console.cloud.google.com -> APIs & Services -> Library
3. Enable 'Google Calendar API'
4. Place credentials.json (same Google OAuth2 Desktop file as email-mcp) in project root
5. node mcp_servers/calendar-mcp/index.js --auth   (one-time OAuth login, saves calendar_token.json)
6. Restart Claude Code -- the calendar tools appear automatically

draft_calendar_event.description: Draft a Google Calendar event -> save to /Plans + /Pending Approval

create_calendar_event.description: Create in Google Calendar. HITL gate: draft must be in /Approved first. Notifies attendees.

update_calendar_event.description: Update an existing Google Calendar event. HITL gate: draft must be in /Approved first.

list_calendar_drafts.description: List all calendar drafts with status across all folders

_test_commands.draft: Ask Claude: "Draft a calendar event: Team standup tomorrow 10am-10:30am"
_test_commands.create: Ask Claude: "Create the approved calendar event calendar_draft_[date]_Team_standup.md"

slack-mcp.description: Slack message draft and send via HITL-gated tool-use. Tools: draft_slack_message, send_slack_message, read_slack_channel, approve_slack_draft, reject_slack_draft, list_slack_drafts.
_setup: 1. cd mcp_servers/slack-mcp && npm install
2. Go to https://api.slack.com/apps -> Create New App -> From Scratch
3. Name the app (e.g. 'AI Employee') and select your Slack workspace
4. Go to 'OAuth & Permissions' -> 'Bot Token Scopes' and add:
chat:write        (send messages)
channels:read     (list public channels)
channels:history  (read public channel messages)
groups:read       (list private channels)
groups:history    (read private channel messages)
im:read           (read DMs)
im:history        (read DM messages)
users:read        (resolve user display names)
5. Go to 'Install App' -> 'Install to Workspace' -> Authorize
6. Copy the 'Bot User OAuth Token' (starts with xoxb-)
7. Create .env in the project root: SLACK_TOKEN=xoxb-your-token-here
8. Invite the bot to any channel: /invite @YourAppName
9. Restart Claude Code -- the Slack tools appear automatically

draft_slack_message.description: Compose a Slack message -> save to /Plans + /Pending Approval

send_slack_message.description: Send via Slack API. HITL gate: draft must be in /Approved first.

read_slack_channel.description: Read recent messages from a Slack channel (up to 100)

list_slack_drafts.description: List all Slack message drafts with status across all folders

_test_commands.read: Ask Claude: "Read the last 10 messages from #general"
_test_commands.draft: Ask Claude: "Draft a Slack message to #general: 'Team standup in 5 minutes'"
_test_commands.send: Ask Claude: "Send the approved Slack message slack_draft_[date]_general.md"
